use hyper::client::connect::HttpConnector;
use hyper::Client;
use std::sync::Arc;
use tokio::sync::OnceCell;

struct HttpClient {
    client: Client<HttpConnector>,
}

static HTTP_CLIENT: OnceCell<Arc<HttpClient>> = OnceCell::const_new();

async fn get_client() -> Arc<HttpClient> {
    HTTP_CLIENT
        .get_or_init(|| async {
            let connector = HttpConnector::new();
            let client = Client::builder().build(connector);
            Arc::new(HttpClient { client })
        })
        .await
        .clone()
}

// GOOD: reuse shared client across requests
async fn fetch_url(url: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let client = get_client().await;
    let resp = client.client.get(url.parse()?).await?;
    let body = hyper::body::to_bytes(resp.into_body()).await?;
    Ok(String::from_utf8_lossy(&body).to_string())
}
